name: andrea
description: Andrea v4 — Jeff Story's personal assistant, now a conductor. 37 custom skills for work (Cisco), music (Rad Dad, Stalemate, solo), code side-projects, Ham radio, voice, research, memory, and trust-gated autonomy. v4 adds the conductor pattern: /conductor orchestrates multi-part tasks, /self-assess checks her capabilities honestly, /learn-skill auto-generates new skills when gaps are found, /discover-tool finds new MCP connectors when current ones don't fit. Named after the 1998 Stalemate single. Draft-first by default.
